name: Blaze Slice
effect_text: [Main] / [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this turn. Then, if your opponent has 2 or less Life cards, rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less. [Trigger] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less.
